title: Designated learning institutions in Canada - Canada.ca
content:
## Designated learning institutions in Canada
Find out how schools can welcome international students to study in Canada, how to verify letters of acceptance, and how to submit compliance reports.
- Sign in to the DLI Portal for compliance reporting
- Sign in to the LOA Portal to verify letters of acceptance
- Volunteer work conducted by foreign students

## Services and information
Find out how to get accredited and join the designated learning institution (DLI) list

### Enrol in the DLI Portal
What the portal is and how to enrol

### Verify letters of acceptance
How to sign up for the LOA Portal and verify your DLI’s letters of acceptance

### Submit student compliance reports
What student compliance reporting is, how to complete your reports, what the information is used for and how to contact us

### Use best practices as a DLI
Prevent fake applications, issue helpful letters of acceptance, know the requirements for study permits and visas and learn about authorized representatives

### Reporting requirements for post-secondary DLIs
DLI obligations, how we conduct verifications and what happens if you’re non-compliant with the regulatory conditions New
